title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at COSCO India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at COSCO India
jsonLd.description:
Join the COSCO India family as a Fleet Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About COSCO India:
COSCO India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with COSCO India!
